title: StoryWorld
description: Story world: rules of the universe. Everything in the story must obey these rules.

world_name.description: Display name e.g. The Emerald Jungle

magic_system.description: Optional; use when genre is fantasy

rules.description: World rules that all events must obey (e.g. animals can speak during full moon)

visual_style.description: For image generation e.g. cinematic jungle with fog and glowing plants
